items.title: Who decides what AI tells you? Campbell Brown, once Meta’s news chief, has thoughts
items.summary: "The conversation is sort of happening in Silicon Valley around one thing, and a totally different conversation is happening among consumers."
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.

items.title: Numero AI acquires Royu in cash-and-stock deal
items.summary: The combined entity will be building agentic platform for the finance and controller functions in enterprises with goal of shifting tasks from manual to automated.

items.title: LinkedIn planning to lay off 5% of staff in latest tech-sector cuts, source says
items.summary: The ‌cuts come as revenue at LinkedIn, which sells recruiting tools and subscriptions, rose 12% in the just-ended quarter from a year prior
